title: THE FIND — Pattern E family + Ginger (no Mrs. Patel)
prompt:
Cast LOCKS:
- @Papa: 100% HUMAN HEAD, bald + dark beard + glasses, gray cardigan, blue henley. WOLF EARS HEADBAND only (plush ears on bald head). Holds WOLF MASK in right hand below shoulder, NEVER on face. Head stays human EVERY shot.
- @Mama: orange knitted BEANIE, blonde hair, fair skin, rust knit sweater, dark jeans.
- @Eva: 3yo curly bright-blonde, pumpkin onesie + green leaf hat.
- @Sara: 7yo wavy dark-blonde, pink-white tutu + tiara + wings.
- @Ginger: 4yo Jack Russell, white-and-tan, pumpkin-orange cape, BIGGER than Pomeranian, NOT puppy.

Shot 1 (0-3s, low-angle wide, hand-held settle, hold on Pattern E anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Hold the Pattern E composition exactly: @Eva foreground-right kneeling, her ARMS CRADLE @Ginger in pumpkin cape; @Sara center-right kneeling beside Eva, hand on Ginger's head; @Papa (HUMAN HEAD, wolf-ears headband, mask in right hand) center-left kneeling; @Mama (orange beanie, rust sweater) center standing behind kids holding flashlight. Decorations per still: lollipop pole, candy-corn lights, cobweb arch.

Shot 2 (3-5s, MCU OTS, slow tracking pan), slow dolly-in 8 inches, focus pull bg→subject) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group Tighter on Eva and Ginger at foreground-right of the group. @Eva's ARMS HUG @Ginger closer, Ginger's tail wags from inside the pumpkin cape, Ginger nuzzles into Eva's collar. @Sara's left hand pets Ginger's head once. @Eva, gently: "Oh GINGER! We found you!"

Shot 3 (5-7s, MCU OTS, slow tracking pan), slow pan left) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group Follow over to Papa and Mama at center-left of the group. @Papa tilts his head toward @Eva with a warm dad-grin. @Mama raises her right hand to her chest with a delighted relieved expression.

Shot 4 (7-10s, low-angle wide, slow crane up to eye-level — release breath, slow pull back to Pattern E anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Settle on the family group only — @Eva still cradles @Ginger, @Sara's hand stays on Ginger's head, @Papa kneels behind (HUMAN HEAD with wolf-ears-headband, MASK in his hand), @Mama stands behind (orange beanie, rust sweater), hand at chest. All five hold position per Pattern E. @Mama, warm: "Bravest kids on the block!" @Sara, smiling up at Mama: "We found her, Mama!"
negativePrompt: papa with wolf fur on body
cameraStyle: static low-angle medium-wide on Pattern E group still, slow dolly push to soft medium on Eva and Ginger, slow pan left to Papa and Mama, slow pan right to Mrs. Patel, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Pattern E composition at @ep15_house5_candy_house — @Eva foreground-right kneeling cradling @Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape on dried leaves; @Sara center-right kneeling beside Eva, hand on Ginger's head; @Papa center-left kneeling (HUMAN HEAD with wolf-ears-headband, mask in hand); @Mama center standing behind kids with orange beanie + rust sweater + hand on chest in relief; soft warm candy-corn string lights twinkling above.
